overview.purpose: Provides a workflow for decomposing an image into editable RGBA layers, editing those layers, recombining them, and exporting results in creative-tool-friendly formats.
overview.shape: Shallow, script-first structure centered on Gradio apps rather than a reusable package architecture.

modules.role: Loads the layered decomposition pipeline and packages outputs as gallery images, PPTX, ZIP, and PSD artifacts.
Edits one RGBA layer with Qwen Image Edit and restores transparency via segmentation.
Alpha-composites multiple transparent layers into one final image.

observations: The repository is optimized for user workflow across separate apps, not for internal code reuse.
Most logic is concentrated in src/app.py, while the other scripts operate as companion tools.
External pretrained models are core runtime dependencies, making environment setup important.
unknowns: No dependency manifest is present in the analyzed snapshot.
Referenced assets such as assets/test_images appear to be missing from the snapshot.
CUDA, model cache, and exact version expectations are not defined in the captured files.
